decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. All 10 checked sessions followed it consistently.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 34/3528 lines reworked (1.0%, 37/50). 0/28 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 0.6% (17/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 66. Session 11: 57 (process:40 efficiency:10 ttfw:7). Session 12: 47 (process:40 efficiency:6 ttfw:1).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 279/279 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
